evals.expected_output: Should perform 4-phase memory consolidation: Orient (list memory files, read MEMORY.md), Gather Signal (find recent learnings), Consolidate (update/prune topic files), Prune/Index (keep MEMORY.md under 200 lines). Output should include a Dream Summary with consolidated files, pruned entries, and key learnings.

evals.prompt: My MEMORY.md is getting cluttered and I think some topic files have overlapping content. Can you run /dream to clean it up?
evals.expected_output: Should orient to current memory structure, identify duplicated content across topic files, merge duplicates, delete contradicted facts, and produce a summary of changes.

evals.prompt: Before I start a big architecture review session, let me run /dream to make sure my memory is organized.
evals.expected_output: Should quickly scan memory for current state, note any urgent pruning needed (MEMORY.md approaching 200 lines), and produce a consolidation summary without exhaustive transcript reading.
